hooks.command: echo 'OBSIDIAN VAULT WORKFLOW: This project requires the obsidian-vault-workflow skill. At session start, invoke it via the Skill tool to run Phase 1 - locate the topic file under vault/Meeting Notes/, read its Overview, Open Questions, and full Session Log, plus the 2-3 most recent Meeting Notes - BEFORE any work. After completing each task, run Phase 2 - append a dated Session Log entry with status tag and Related wikilinks.'

echo 'REMINDER: Invoke the obsidian-vault-workflow skill (Phase 1) before responding - identify the topic, locate its file in vault/Meeting Notes/ (or the right folder), read its Overview and Session Log. After finishing the task, append the Phase 2 Session Log entry with [status] tag and Related wikilinks. The skill is mandatory for any task that touches files or makes decisions.'
